name: WalmartChecker
short: Check Walmart item stock by item number or name.
description: Search Walmart by item number or keyword to check stock status, price, and availability. Includes a tracking command that alerts you when an item comes back in stock.
author: aKidWolfe96
install_msg: Thanks for installing WalmartChecker! Use `[p]walmart` to get started.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
